# Copilot instructions for Denplan

- Treat this as a premium firearms retail website for Deplan Trading Enterprise.
- Preserve the dark, high-end visual style with gold accents and elegant typography.
- Prefer Tailwind utilities and the existing design tokens in src/index.css.
- Keep the app structure simple: React + TypeScript + Vite + React Router.
- Maintain existing routes and navigation behavior.
- Keep content and compliance wording consistent with the current brand voice.
- Use accessible, polished UI patterns and subtle motion.
- Avoid unnecessary dependencies or architecture changes.
